cards.back: A function that assigns a numerical value to each outcome in a probability experiment
A function that defines the probability of each possible value of a discrete random variable
A function that defines the probability of each possible value of a continuous random variable
The long-run average value of a random variable, calculated as the sum of each value multiplied by its probability
A measure of the spread or dispersion of a random variable, calculated as the average of the squared differences from the expected value
